HomePage.title: Mini games
HomePage.subtitle: Choose a game — more coming soon

GamePage.comingSoon: This game is not ready yet. Check back later.

DotsGame.turnDrawing: Complete the enclosure: click adjacent dots of your color and return to the start
DotsGame.rulesShort: Tap/click an empty intersection to place a dot (it stays movable until you Accept). Accept: finalize the turn. Tap/click another empty intersection to move the dot within the same turn. After placing, tap/click an adjacent dot of your color to start an enclosure — then click adjacent dots of your color in a loop, finishing on the starting dot. Valid loops that surround opponent dots score and block those points. Undo: cancel drawing or remove the unaccepted dot; otherwise undo the last accepted turn. Clear: new game. Surrender ends the match.
DotsGame.invalidGridSize: Enter whole numbers between {min} and {max} for rows and columns.

dots.name: Dots
dots.description: Surround opponent dots with your polygons to score
